releases.title: collectZ v3.10.22
releases.summary: This patch consolidates the safe dependency and workflow updates from the open PR backlog so the remaining pull requests are easier to reason about.

details.heading: Highlights
bullets: Updated backend runtime dependencies for Express 4, AWS S3, Nodemailer, Helmet, Postgres, Axios, Fast XML Parser, rate limiting, and CSV parsing.
Updated frontend Vite to the current open patch release.
Updated CI workflow actions for upload-artifact and Trivy.
Left major or compatibility-sensitive PRs out of this slice for separate review.

releases.title: collectZ v3.10.21
releases.summary: This patch replaces the always-visible Cards/List buttons in shared library headers with a compact view-mode menu whose trigger reflects the current layout.

details.heading: Highlights
bullets: Added a shared view-mode menu to the page header toolbar.
The trigger shows the active layout icon and opens a small menu with Grid view and List view options.
The selected layout is marked in the menu while preserving accessible menu semantics.
Existing search, filter, sort, and add controls remain available.

releases.title: collectZ v3.10.20
releases.summary: This patch quiets the right side of desktop library headers by making secondary controls more compact while keeping search, filter, view, sort, and add actions available.

details.heading: Highlights
bullets: Tightened the shared library header view toggle spacing.
Made the desktop add action icon-only while preserving accessible labels and titles.
Grouped view/sort controls more tightly so search and filter remain the primary desktop header controls.
Kept the existing mobile compact header behavior intact.

releases.title: collectZ v3.10.19
releases.summary: This patch stabilizes the admin shell browser regression in CI by making the test setup enable the gated library surfaces it asserts against and by avoiding brittle browser response-body reads for dashboard summary data.

details.heading: Highlights
bullets: Browser setup now enables both `events_enabled` and `collectibles_enabled`.
The dashboard command center regression reads `/api/dashboard/summary` through the authenticated Playwright request context instead of parsing a page network response body.
The mobile compact toolbar and desktop section-heading regressions now run with Art, Collectibles, and Events available in the CI fixture state.

releases.title: collectZ v3.10.18
releases.summary: This patch stabilizes the admin shell browser regression after the recent desktop/mobile header work by making dashboard tab navigation in the test follow the app's mounted route-sync behavior.

details.heading: Highlights
bullets: Added a small Playwright helper that dispatches dashboard route state after query-tab navigation.
Updated the mobile compact toolbar regression to use that helper.
Updated the desktop library heading regression to use that helper.
Updated the mobile utility header regression to use that helper.
Corrected Capture Inbox expectations now that its page heading is intentionally visible.

releases.title: collectZ v3.10.17
releases.summary: This patch removes descriptive header copy from desktop Art, Collectibles, and Events library pages so library headers stay compact and consistent with the newer title/search/filter pattern.

details.heading: Highlights
bullets: Removed the Art header description.
Removed the Collectibles header description.
Removed the Events header description.
Added browser regression coverage so those desktop headers keep page-title-only behavior.
Kept empty-state and drawer body copy unchanged.

releases.title: collectZ v3.10.16
releases.summary: This patch consolidates library filter controls into a single funnel menu so desktop and mobile pages stop carrying loose secondary filter fields in the main search toolbar.

details.heading: Highlights
bullets: Added a shared `FilterMenu` primitive using the existing funnel icon.
Moved media library quick filters into the funnel menu.
Moved Art event and exclusive filters into the funnel menu.
Moved Collectibles category, event, and exclusive filters into the funnel menu.
Moved Events date range filters into the funnel menu.
Kept live search, view mode, sort, and add actions outside the filter menu.
Left Loans status tabs unchanged because they act as primary loan state tabs.

releases.title: collectZ v3.10.15
releases.summary: This patch moves mobile library search controls into the compact shell header row beside the active section icon, removing the extra search band that was still taking vertical space.

details.heading: Highlights
bullets: Added a mobile shell toolbar slot next to the current section icon.
Let the shared page search toolbar portal mobile controls into that shell slot.
Hid the page-local search toolbar on mobile when a shell-inline toolbar is active.
Applied the pattern to Library, Art, Collectibles, and Events surfaces.
Kept desktop page headers and toolbar behavior unchanged.

releases.title: collectZ v3.10.14
releases.summary: This patch corrects the mobile header icon placement so the current section icon lives in the top app header navigation button instead of taking space in the search toolbar row.

details.heading: Highlights
bullets: Moved mobile section icons into the shell header navigation button.
Removed the section icon slot from the shared mobile search toolbar.
Kept mobile page titles available as screen-reader text and in the navigation button label.
Updated Capture Inbox mobile readback to use the full page name.
Preserved desktop header behavior and existing search/filter/add toolbar behavior.

releases.title: collectZ v3.10.13
releases.summary: This patch makes mobile library headers more compact by moving the visible page cue into the search row as a section icon while preserving the page title for accessibility.

details.heading: Highlights
bullets: Added icon-led mobile search rows to shared library headers.
Added section icons for Audio, Art, Books, Comics, Collectibles, Events, Games, Loans, Movies, TV, and Capture Inbox.
Kept page titles available as accessibility text.
Changed the mobile app shell title to screen-reader-only text so it no longer duplicates the page cue visually.
Preserved desktop title/header behavior.
